title: Trump invests millions in Kura Sushi chain
shortDescription: Among the long list of investments President Trump listed in a filing is Kura Sushi. The president invested $1 million-$5 million in the sushi chain.

title: Vanessa Trump's breast cancer diagnosis. What to know
shortDescription: Vanessa Trump recently revealed she has been diagnosed with breast cancer. Here's what to know about the disease.

title: Bezos says taxing him more won't help teachers. Mamdani disagrees.
shortDescription: It comes as Mamdani has faced sharp criticisms from other billionaires in recent weeks.

title: How is Vanessa Trump related to Donald Trump? She shared cancer diagnosis
shortDescription: Vanessa Trump announced she has breast cancer on May 20. The former model is the ex-wife of Donald Trump Jr. They have five children together.

title: US aircraft carrier enters Caribbean as Trump escalates Cuba pressure
shortDescription: The USS Nimitz arrived in the southern Caribbean on the same day the Justice Department indicted Cuba's Raúl Castro on murder charges.

title: Mamdani's press policy review draws First Amendment scrutiny
shortDescription: The review followed outcry over supporters of accused murderer Luigi Mangione making inflammatory remarks while wearing city-issued press credentials.

title: 'Our message is clear': Trump admin prepares to fine migrants $18,000
shortDescription: The Trump administration will fine migrants $18,000 for deportation costs, making it harder to return legally.

title: Trump to ease Biden-era refrigerant rules in push to cut grocery costs
shortDescription: President Trump is set to announce the overhaul of two Biden-era EPA rules for refrigerants at grocery stores in a push to cut costs for consumers.

title: Gas prices top $4.50 a gallon as Trump calls cost concerns 'peanuts'
shortDescription: As the average price of gas in the US continues to rise, President Trump is again asking Americans for patience at the pump.

title: Jeff Bezos says he wasn't trying to gain Trump's favor with 'Melania’ doc
shortDescription: Jeff Bezos defended Amazon’s reported $75M “Melania” documentary deal, denying claims it was meant to influence President Trump.

title: Trump probe prosecutor indicted for smuggling 'cake recipe' files
shortDescription: A federal prosecutor who worked on Jack Smith's Trump probe was indicted for allegedly smuggling secret documents.

title: Trump says he could 'run for prime minister in Israel'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters on Wednesday, May 20, that he "could run for prime minister" in Israel.

title: Republicans approval of Trump's handling of the economy slips
shortDescription: Republicans have become increasingly weary of President Donald Trump’s handling of the economy over the last couple of months, a new AP/NORC poll says.

title: 'It weakens the GOP.' Could Trump's targeting of Republicans backfire?
shortDescription: Trump again proved his dominance in the GOP by ousting Rep. Thomas Massie, but he has been leading the party into politically perilous territory.

title: Trump says ‘there won’t be escalation’ with Cuba
shortDescription: President Trump praised the indictment of Raúl Castro, the former president of Cuba, but added that he doesn't plan to escalate tensions.

title: Jan. 6 police officers sue to block Trump's $1.8B 'slush fund'
shortDescription: Two police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol on Jan. 6, 2021, sued President Trump in a bid to block a new $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund.

title: Raúl Castro went from Fidel's shadow to Trump DOJ's crosshairs
shortDescription: Communist guerrilla, Bay of Pigs defender and Fidel Castro's successor, Raúl Castro is now the target of a U.S. criminal indictment.

title: Trump administration indicts Raúl Castro
shortDescription: The Trump administration has indicted Raúl Castro on charges related to a 1996 shooting of a civilian plane.

title: Trump speaks at Coast Guard graduation
shortDescription: President Donald Trump speaks to the U.S. Coast Guard Academy graduates during their 145th commencement on May 20, 2026.
